description: Fermi Inc. engages in the development of private power campus for AI-centric customers in the United States. The company also develops, owns, and leases grid-independent energy generation and high-performance computing campuses; develops and operates integrated power generation and computing infrastructure. It also engages in acquisition of land, permitting, construction, and long-term leases. The company was founded and incorporated on January 10th, 2025 is headquartered in Amarillo, Texas, USA.
